name: mcp-google-workspace
description: Production Google Workspace MCP server for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Tasks, People, Forms, Slides, and optional Apps, Chat, Keep, Meet, and Gemini integrations.
long_description: Google Workspace MCP server for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Tasks, People, Forms, and Slides, with optional Google Chat, Google Keep, Google Meet, and Gemini media integrations. Authenticates via OAuth with your Google account and gives Claude Desktop full read/write access to your Workspace data through natural language.

credentials_dir.title: Credentials Directory
credentials_dir.description: Directory containing credentials.json and where token.json should be stored. Leave empty to use the bundle defaults.

enable_apps_dashboard.title: Enable Apps Dashboard
enable_apps_dashboard.description: Mount the local Apps dashboard namespace and UI resources.

enable_chat.title: Enable Google Chat
enable_chat.description: Mount Chat tools and request Chat OAuth scopes.

enable_gemini.title: Enable Gemini Media
enable_gemini.description: Mount Gemini image, audio, and video tools powered by the Gemini Developer API.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API Key
gemini_api_key.description: Gemini Developer API key used for Gemini media tools. Required only when Gemini Media is enabled.

gemini_image_generate_model.title: Gemini Image Generate Model
gemini_image_generate_model.description: Default Gemini model for image generation tools.

gemini_image_edit_model.title: Gemini Image Edit Model
gemini_image_edit_model.description: Default Gemini model for image editing tools.

gemini_video_understanding_model.title: Gemini Video Understanding Model
gemini_video_understanding_model.description: Default Gemini model for video understanding tools.

gemini_audio_understanding_model.title: Gemini Audio Understanding Model
gemini_audio_understanding_model.description: Default Gemini model for audio understanding tools.

gemini_reasoning_model.title: Gemini Reasoning Model
gemini_reasoning_model.description: Higher-reasoning Gemini model allowed for advanced audio or video analysis overrides.

gemini_output_dir.title: Gemini Output Directory
gemini_output_dir.description: Directory where Gemini-generated image files are written locally.

gemini_timeout_seconds.title: Gemini Timeout (Seconds)
gemini_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time allowed for a single Gemini API request.

enable_keep.title: Enable Google Keep
enable_keep.description: Mount Keep tools and request the Keep OAuth scope.

enable_meet.title: Enable Google Meet
enable_meet.description: Mount Meet tools and request Meet OAuth scopes.

http_timeout_seconds.title: HTTP Timeout (Seconds)
http_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time allowed for a single Google API request.

http_retries.title: HTTP Retries
http_retries.description: Retry count used when Google API requests fail transiently.

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Python log level for stderr logs. Use DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, or CRITICAL.

oauth_port.title: OAuth Callback Port
oauth_port.description: Port for the local OAuth callback server. Use 0 to pick a free port automatically.

oauth_open_browser.title: Open Browser For OAuth
oauth_open_browser.description: Open the system browser automatically during the OAuth consent flow.
